narrative:
Precinct Steubenville 5-3 (precinct in Jefferson County) has 744 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
